items.name: 清華亭
items.location: 北海道札幌市北区北7条西7丁目
items.description: 札幌最初の公園「偕楽園」に明治13年貴賓接待所として建築。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the Seikatei. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 1961-06-07, located at Kita 7-jo Nishi 7-chome, Kita-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

items.name: 新琴似屯田兵中隊本部
items.location: 北海道札幌市北区新琴似8条3丁目
items.description: 明治19年に新琴似屯田兵村の本部として建築されたもので、週番所（中隊本部）としては札幌に残る唯一のもの。

en.name_en: Shinkotoni Tonden Colonist Soldier Company Headquarters
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the Shinkotoni tonden colonist soldier company headquarters. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 1974-04-20, located at Shinkotoni 8-jo 3-chome, Kita-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

items.name: 旧黒岩家住宅（旧簾舞通行屋）
items.location: 北海道札幌市南区簾舞1条2丁目
items.description: 明治5年に有珠新道の交通の要所となるミソマップ（簾舞）に建築されたもので、札幌における通行屋の唯一の遺構。

en.name_en: Former Kuroiwa Residence (Former Misumai Wayfarers' Lodge)
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the former Kuroiwa residence, formerly the Misumai wayfarers' lodge. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 1984-03-28, located at Misumai 1-jo 2-chome, Minami-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

items.name: 木造日蓮聖人坐像
items.location: 北海道札幌市中央区南11条西9丁目豊葦山妙心寺
items.description: 彩色寄木造りで、僧日住が厄除けのため寛文6年（1666年）に造立させたもの。所有者:豊葦山妙心寺

en.name_en: Wooden Seated Statue of Saint Nichiren
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a wooden seated statue of Saint Nichiren. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 1981-07-21, located at Toashizan Myoshinji Temple, Minami 11-jo Nishi 9-chome, Chuo-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

items.name: 旧琴似川流域の竪穴住居跡分布図
items.location: 北海道札幌市中央区南22条西13丁目札幌市埋蔵文化財センタ一
items.description: 明治27・28年頃高畑宜一氏により作成された、市内都心部から北区麻生町付近までの擦文時代（約1300年～800年前）の竪穴住居跡の窪みを約720カ所記録した分布図。

en.name_romaji: Kyū Kotonigawa Ryūiki no Tateana Jūkyo Ato Bunpuzu
en.name_en: Distribution Map of Pit Dwelling Sites in the Former Kotoni River Basin
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a distribution map of pit dwelling sites in the former Kotoni River basin. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 2004-08-25, located at the Sapporo Buried Cultural Property Center, Minami 22-jo Nishi 13-chome, Chuo-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

items.name: 札幌市N30遺跡出土品
items.location: 北海道札幌市中央区南22条西13丁目札幌市埋蔵文化財センタ一
items.description: 平成7・8年に、西区二十四軒4条1丁目で発掘調査した縄文時代後期から晩期（約3700～2300年前）の出土品（1413点）。縄文時代晩期末の墓からは、土偶やサメの歯も出土。

en.name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Sapporo City N30 Site
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of artifacts excavated from the Sapporo City N30 site. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 2004-08-25, located at the Sapporo Buried Cultural Property Center, Minami 22-jo Nishi 13-chome, Chuo-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

items.name: 札幌独立キリスト教会文書
items.location: 北海道札幌市中央区大通西22丁目札幌独立キリスト教会
items.description: クラ一ク博士起草の「イエスを信ずる者の契約」等、明治初期の文書計7点。

en.name_en: Documents of the Sapporo Independent Christian Church
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of documents of the Sapporo Independent Christian Church. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 2016-07-28, located at the Sapporo Independent Christian Church, Odori Nishi 22-chome, Chuo-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

items.name: 旧札幌控訴院
items.location: 北海道札幌市中央区大通西13丁目
items.description: 大正15年に建てられた、煉瓦・軟石・RC構造の洋風建築物。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the former Sapporo Court of Appeals building. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 2018-03-08, located at Odori Nishi 13-chome, Chuo-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

items.name: 丘珠獅子舞
items.location: 北海道札幌市東区丘珠（保持団体住所）
items.description: 明治25年に富山県からの移住者によって伝えられ、伝承してきた獅子舞。所有者:丘珠獅子舞保存会

en.description_en: This is an intangible cultural property consisting of the Okadama lion dance (shishimai). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 1974-10-25, based in Okadama, Higashi-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido (address of the holding group).

items.name: 手稲山口バッタ塚
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 北海道札幌市手稲区手稲山口324-308
items.description: 明治16年にトノサマバッタの大群を駆除するために、大量の卵のうを埋めた畝状の塚跡。

en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of the Teine Yamaguchi locust mound. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 1978-08-21, located at Teineyamaguchi 324-308, Teine-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.

items.name: 札幌村・大友亀太郎関係歴史資料及び史跡
items.location: 北海道札幌市東区北13条東16丁目札幌村郷土記念館
items.description: 種類:市指定有形文化財及び史跡。慶応2年（1866年）、札幌村は大友亀太郎によって開拓が進められ、その後、玉葱栽培の先進地として発展した。これらの歴史資料及び役宅跡。

en.name_romaji: Sapporo-mura / Ōtomo Kametarō Kankei Rekishi Shiryō Oyobi Shiseki
en.name_en: Historical Materials and Historic Site Relating to Sapporo Village and Otomo Kametaro
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property and historic site consisting of historical materials and a historic site relating to Sapporo village and Otomo Kametaro. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sapporo City, designated on 1987-02-20, located at the Sapporo Village Folk Museum, Kita 13-jo Higashi 16-chome, Higashi-ku, Sapporo City, Hokkaido.
